arts.ttl: David Moyes confronts Liverpool’s key advantage ‘to start building Everton again’
arts.sum: The Everton boss is keen to bridge the gap to Liverpool on his return to Goodison and the final derby before the Toffees enter a new stadium next season

arts.sum: Liverpool face a run of five Premier League games in 15 days in a run that could prove decisive in the title race

arts.ttl: David Moyes believes Everton have to "dream" about closing gap on rivals Liverpool again
arts.sum: Everton host Liverpool in Merseyside derby but boss David Moyes is also thinking about closing the gap long term on their rivals as well as in the game on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sets clear Premier League target for Liverpool and delivers Arsenal warning
arts.sum: Liverpool head to Everton on Wednesday night looking to move nine points ahead of Arsenal in the Premier League title race but he's not concerned about psychological blow for Gunners

arts.ttl: Imagine the hate if Mo Salah ever wore an Everton shirt as a joke like Ian Rush did in the Eighties, writes IAN HERBERT - ahead of the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: At a lunch place in Liverpool 's Castle Street on Monday, we reacquainted Ian Rush with an image of himself posing in an Everton shirt.

arts.sum: Neal Maupay aimed at outrageous jibe at Paul Scholes after the Man United legend criticised the Frenchman's notorious antics on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea & Liverpool eye Huijsen - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Three clubs are interested in Bournemouth's Dean Huijsen, Liverpool eye Nice winger Mohamed-Ali Cho, Chelsea prepare bid for Pablo Barrios, plus more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool very nearly sold player Arne Slot is 'very happy' with for £71m in January transfer window - Romano

arts.ttl: January deal was nearly sealed for 39-goal, 22-assist attacker as Romano confirms Liverpool January transfer decision
arts.sum: Liverpool star Darwin Nunez was the subject of two bids from Saudi Pro League giants Al-Nassr during the January transfer window, transfer expert Fabrizio Romano has confirmed. The Uruguayan forward was linked with a move away from Anfield, attracting interest from AC Milan, Al-Hilal, and Al-Nassr.
